summary: Iteration 39 - Verified backend route refactoring: Auth routes (routes/auth.py) and Notification routes (routes/notifications.py) extracted from server.py. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend login, dashboard, and challenges pages work correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified the backend refactoring. Routes extracted from server.py to separate modules: routes/auth.py (login, register, profile, avatar, reset) and routes/notifications.py (get, count, mark-read, delete). All routes included in server.py via app.include_router() with prefix='/api'. Test account test1@test.com/Test1234! has $10.1M funds, Level 0, 0 films. Dashboard shows user data correctly, Challenges page displays all battle modes.

auth_routes_refactoring.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Login with valid credentials returns token and user
auth_routes_refactoring.GET /api/auth/me: PASSED - Returns user profile with valid token

no_route_conflicts.GET /api/genres: PASSED - Main router endpoints work (16 genres)
no_route_conflicts.GET /api/stats/detailed: PASSED - Stats endpoint returns films, progression, revenue

frontend_verification.Dashboard: PASSED - Shows user TESTPLAYER1, $10.1M funds, Lv.0
frontend_verification.Challenges page: PASSED - Shows 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, 4v4, Free For All, Offline challenges

refactoring_verification.routes_auth_py: Contains: register, login, recovery, profile, reset, avatar endpoints
refactoring_verification.routes_notifications_py: Contains: get, count, mark-read, read-all, delete endpoints
